evidence: Generic subscription-box-of-local-artisan-goods idea; no single company traceable to this specific pitch, though the model (e.g. NoCoBox, Explore Local) exists broadly.
Pepper, a B2B restaurant-supplier platform, pivoted in April 2020 to Pepper Pantry, selling restaurant supply-chain groceries direct to consumers, matching the pitch almost exactly.

company: FlexiSpot / Autonomous / other budget standing desk brands
evidence: Affordable portable standing desks (e.g. FlexiSpot, Autonomous) were already widely sold well before the March 2020 pitch.
Credit Karma (credit reports + card affiliate revenue) was founded in 2007, long before Sam cited it as a model in 2020.
NerdWallet, a financial comparison/lead-gen site, was founded in 2009.
The Penny Hoarder, monetized via affiliate money-saving content, was founded in 2010.
Thumbtack, the services marketplace, was founded in 2008.
Manzil, the Toronto halal-mortgage fintech, was founded by Mohamad Sawwaf in 2017, cited by Sam as an existing example.
Papa, the 'grandkids on-demand' senior-companionship company, launched nationally in January 2018 (YC-backed).
Honor, the on-demand home caretaker platform, was founded in 2014.
